definitions.text: To use or experience the sense of touch. To become aware of through the skin; to use the sense of touch on.
examples: You can feel a heartbeat if you put your fingers on your breast.
I felt cold and miserable all night.

definitions.text: To become aware of through the skin; to use the sense of touch on.
examples: You can feel a heartbeat if you put your fingers on your breast.
I felt cold and miserable all night.

definitions.text: To find one's way (literally or figuratively) by touching or using cautious movements.
examples: I felt my way through the darkened room.
I felt my way cautiously through the dangerous business maneuver.

definitions.text: A perception experienced mainly or solely through the sense of touch.

examples: You should get a feel for the area before moving in.
